content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:DisneyLucas.jpg|thumb|right|250px|On [[October 30]], 2012, [[The Walt Disney Company]] agreed to purchase [[Lucasfilm]] for $4.05 billion and announced [[Star Wars: Episode VII The Force Awakens|''Star Wars'': Episode VII]] would be released in [[2015]].]]

A list of events in '''2012''' related to ''[[Star Wars]]''.

==January==
*[[January 1|01]] – ''[[The Wrath of Darth Maul]]'' released.
*01 – [[LEGO Star Wars: The Padawan Menace (book)|''LEGO Star Wars: The Padawan Menace'']] released.
*01 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: Anakin: Space Pilot]]'' released.
*01 – ''[[Star Wars: The Phantom Menace 3D Storybook]]'' released.
*01 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: Darth Maul's Mission]]'' released.
*01 – [[Bob Anderson]] dies.
*[[January 6|06]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars|''The Clone Wars'']]: "[[Escape from Kadavo]]" aired.
*[[January 10|10]] – [[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']] released.
*10 – [[Oliver Maguire]] dies.
*[[January 11|11]] – The [[Star Wars: Legacy—War (TPB)|''Star Wars: Legacy—War'' trade paperback]] released.
*11 – [[Knights of the Old Republic: War 1|''Knights of the Old Republic: War'' 1]] released.
*11 – [[Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse 2|''Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse'' 2]] released.
*[[January 12|12]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.29|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.29]] published.
*[[January 13|13]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[A Friend in Need]]" aired.
*[[January 16|16]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Phantom Menace: The Expanded Visual Dictionary]]'' released.
*16 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Phantom Menace]]'' released.
*16 – ''[[Star Wars: Darth Maul, Sith Apprentice]]'' released.
*16 – ''[[Star Wars: Battle for Naboo]]'' released.
*16 – ''[[Ultimate Sticker Collection: Star Wars: The Phantom Menace]]'' released
*[[January 19|19]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Secret Villain]]'' released.
*[[January 20|20]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Deception]]" aired.
*[[January 26|26]] – [[Ian Abercrombie]] dies.
*[[January 27|27]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Friends and Enemies]]" aired.
*[[January 31|31]] – [[Al Rio]] dies.
*31 – [[Star Wars Insider 131|''Star Wars Insider'' 131]] published.

==February==
*[[February 1|01]] – [[Star Wars: Dawn of the Jedi 0|''Star Wars: Dawn of the Jedi'' 0]] released.
*[[February 3|03]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[The Box]]" aired.
*[[February 8|08]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic: War 2|''Knights of the Old Republic: War'' 2]] released.
*08 – [[Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse 3|''Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse'' 3]] released.
*08 – [[Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost 4|''Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost'' 4]] released.
*08 – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: A Long Time Ago.... Volume 5]]'' released.
*[[February 9|09]] – [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] released in 3D in Australia and the United Kingdom.
*09 – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.30|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.30]] published.
*[[February 10|10]] – ''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]'' released.
*10 – [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] re-released in 3D.
*10 – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Crisis on Naboo]]" aired.
*10 – [[David Anthony Pizzuto]] dies.
*[[February 15|15]] – [[Dawn of the Jedi: Force Storm 1|''Dawn of the Jedi: Force Storm'' 1]] released.
*[[February 20|20]] – ''[[Star Wars: Beware the Sith]]'' released.
*[[February 22|22]] – [[Dark Times—Out of the Wilderness 4|''Dark Times—Out of the Wilderness'' 4]] released.
*22 – [[Star Wars: Jedi—The Dark Side (TPB)|''Star Wars: Jedi—The Dark Side'']] released.
*[[February 24|24]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Massacre]]" aired.
*[[February 28|28]] – ''[[The Old Republic: Deceived]]'' paperback released.
*28 – [[Red Harvest (novel)|''Red Harvest'']] paperback released.

==March==
*[[March 2|02]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Bounty (episode)|Bounty]]" aired.
*[[March 3|03]] – [[Ralph McQuarrie]] dies.
*[[March 5|05]] – ''[[Lost Tribe of the Sith: Secrets]]'' released.
*[[March 7|07]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Enemy Within]]'' released.
*07 – [[Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost 5|''Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost'' 5]] released.
*[[March 8|08]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.31|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.31]] published.
*[[March 9|09]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Brothers]]" aired.
*[[March 13|13]] – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Apocalypse]]'' released.
*13 – [[Star Wars Insider 132|''Star Wars Insider'' 132]] published.
*[[March 14|14]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic: War 3|''Knights of the Old Republic: War'' 3]] released.
*14 – [[Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse 4|''Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse'' 4]] released.
*[[March 15|15]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Secret Missions 4: Guardians of the Chiss Key]]'' released.
*[[March 16|16]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Revenge (episode)|Revenge]]" aired.
*[[March 19|19]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Secret Life of Droids]]'' released.
*[[March 21|21]] – [[Dawn of the Jedi: Force Storm 2|''Dawn of the Jedi: Force Storm'' 2]] released.
*21 – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: The Other Sons of Tatooine]]'' released.
*21 – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Volume 3: The Lost Suns]]'' trade paperback released.
*[[March 23|23]] – [[Disney Junior]] launched.
*[[March 27|27]] – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Vortex]]'' paperback released.
*[[March 30|30]] – ''[[Stencil Wars: The Big Book on Star Wars Inspired Sheet Art]]'' released.
*30 – [[Ivy Wong]] is born.

==April==
*[[April 1|01]] – ''[[Star Wars Activity Handbook 2012]]'' released.
*[[April 3|03]] – ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' released.
*03 – ''[[Kinect Star Wars]]'' released.
*03 – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Magazine 11|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Magazine'' 11]] published.
*[[April 5|05]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.32|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.32]] published.
*[[April 11|11]] – [[Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse 5|''Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse'' 5]] released.
*11 – [[Knights of the Old Republic: War 4|''Knights of the Old Republic: War'' 4]] released.
*[[April 15|15]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Season Four]]'' aired in the UK.
*[[April 18|18]] – [[Dawn of the Jedi: Force Storm 3|''Dawn of the Jedi: Force Storm'' 3]] released.
*18 – ''[[Darth Vader and Son]]'' released.
*[[April 19|19]] – [[Star Wars Identities: The Exhibition]] opened in Montreal and Edmonton.
*[[April 24|24]] – [[Scourge (novel)|''Scourge'']] released.
*[[April 25|25]] – [[Blood Ties: Boba Fett is Dead 1|''Blood Ties: Boba Fett is Dead'' 1]] released.
*25 – [[Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost 6|''Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost'' 6]] released.
*25 – [[Dark Times—Out of the Wilderness 5|''Dark Times—Out of the Wilderness'' 5]] released.
*25 – ''[[Star Wars: Invasion Volume 3—Revelations]]'' released.
*30 – ''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide: Updated and Expanded]]'' released.

==May==
*[[May 1|01]] – [[Star Wars Insider 133|''Star Wars Insider'' 133]] published.
*[[May 3|03]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.33|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.33]] published.
*[[May 4|04]] – [[StarWars.com]] ran a marathon of [[The Clone Wars: Season Four]] episodes, and released an official trailer for [[The Clone Wars: Season Five|Season Five]].
*[[May 5|05]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Art of the Bad Deal]]'' released.
*[[May 9|09]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic: War 5|''Knights of the Old Republic: War'' 5]] released.
*[[May 16|16]] – 10th anniversary of [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']].
*16 – [[Dawn of the Jedi: Force Storm 4|''Dawn of the Jedi: Force Storm'' 4]] released.
*[[May 18|18]]-[[May 20|20]] – The thirteenth [[Star Wars Weekends|''Star Wars'' Weekends]] event begins at [[Disney's Hollywood Studios]].
*[[May 23|23]] – [[Darth Vader and the Ghost Prison 1|''Darth Vader and the Ghost Prison'' 1]] released.
*23 – ''[[The Star Wars Cookbook: Wookiee Pies, Clone Scones, and Other Galactic Goodies]]'' released.
*[[May 25|25]]-[[May 27|27]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney's Hollywood Studios.
*[[May 29|29]] – ''[[The Old Republic: Deceived]]'' paperback released.
*[[May 30|30]] – [[Blood Ties: Boba Fett is Dead 2|''Blood Ties: Boba Fett is Dead'' 2]] released.
*30 – ''[[Star Wars: Knight Errant Volume 2: Deluge]]'' released.
*[[May 31|31]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.34|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.34]] published.

==June==
*[[June 1|01]]-[[June 3|03]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney's Hollywood Studios.
*[[June 4|04]] – [[Vivien Lyra Blair]] is born.
*[[June 6|06]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Droids and Ewoks]]'' released.
*[[June 8|08]]-[[June 10|10]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney's Hollywood Studios.
*[[June 12|12]] – [[Star Wars Insider 134|''Star Wars Insider'' 134]] published.
*[[June 13|13]] – [[Knight Errant: Escape 1|''Knight Errant: Escape'' 1]] released.
*[[June 20|20]] – [[Darth Vader and the Ghost Prison 2|''Darth Vader and the Ghost Prison'' 2]] released.
*20 – [[Dawn of the Jedi: Force Storm 5|''Dawn of the Jedi: Force Storm'' 5]] released.
*[[June 26|26]] – ''[[Choices of One]]'' paperback released.
*[[June 27|27]] – [[Blood Ties: Boba Fett is Dead 3|''Blood Ties: Boba Fett is Dead'' 3]] released.
*[[June 28|28]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.35|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.35]] published.

==July==
*[[July 1|01]] – [[Star Wars: 123|''Star Wars:'' 123]] released.
*01 – ''[[Star Wars ABC]]'' released.
*[[July 5|05]] – The trailer for {{Film|I}} airs on YouTube.
*05 – The trailer for {{Film|III}} airs on YouTube.
*05 – The original trailer for {{Film|IV}} airs on YouTube.
*05 – The original trailer for {{Film|V}} airs on YouTube.
*05 – The original trailer for {{Film|VI}} airs on YouTube.
*[[July 11|11]] – [[Knight Errant: Escape 2|''Knight Errant: Escape'' 2]] released.
*[[July 17|17]] – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Collection]]'' released.
*[[July 18|18]] – [[Darth Vader and the Ghost Prison 3|''Darth Vader and the Ghost Prison'' 3]] released.
*[[July 24|24]] – ''[[Star Wars: Lost Tribe of the Sith: The Collected Stories]]'' released. It included the final novella ''[[Lost Tribe of the Sith: Pandemonium]]''.
*24 – [[Star Wars Insider 135|''Star Wars Insider'' 135]] published.
*[[July 25|25]] – [[Blood Ties: Boba Fett is Dead 4|''Blood Ties: Boba Fett is Dead'' 4]] released.
*25 – [[Darth Maul—Death Sentence 1|''Darth Maul—Death Sentence'' 1]] released.
*[[July 26|26]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.36|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.36]] published.

==August==
*[[August 1|01]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Annual 2013]]'' released.
*01 – ''[[Star Wars Collector Edition 2013: The Prequel Trilogy]]'' released.
*01 – ''[[Star Wars Annual 2013]]'' released.
*[[August 2|02]] – [[Mark Klastorin]] dies.
*06 – ''[[Star Wars Origami: 36 Amazing Paper-folding Projects from a Galaxy Far, Far Away....]]'' released.
*[[August 7|07]] – ''[[X-Wing: Mercy Kill]]'' released.
*07 – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Magazine 13|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Magazine'' 13]] released.
*[[August 8|08]] – [[Knight Errant: Escape 3|''Knight Errant: Escape'' 3]] released.
*08 – [[Lost Tribe of the Sith—Spiral 1|''Lost Tribe of the Sith—Spiral'' 1]] released.
*[[August 17|17]] – The ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Miniatures Game]]'' released at the GenCon gaming convention.
*[[August 22|22]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Clone Wars Volume 1: The Republic Goes to War]]'' released.
*22 – [[Darth Vader and the Ghost Prison 4|''Darth Vader and the Ghost Prison'' 4]] released.
*23 – ''[[Remembering Ralph McQuarrie: Dreamer and Visionary]]'' released.
*23 – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.37|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.37]] published.
*23 –[[August 26|26]] – [[Celebration VI]] held in Orlando, Florida.
*[[August 24|24]] – [[Revival (episode)|"Revival"]] released in a special screening at [[Celebration VI]] prior to its premiere on Cartoon Network.
*[[August 28|28]] – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Conviction]]'' paperback released.
*28 – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Sith Hunters]]'' released.
*[[August 29|29]] – [[Darth Maul—Death Sentence 2|''Darth Maul—Death Sentence'' 2]] released.
*?? – ''[[Ewok Village]]'' released on [[StarWars.com]].

==September==
*[[September 1|01]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: Anakin to the Rescue]]'' released.
*01 – ''[[Star Wars: Phonics]]'' released.
*[[September 4|04]] – [[Star Wars Insider 136|''Star Wars Insider'' 136]] published.
*[[September 12|12]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Crimson Empire Saga]]'' released.
*12 – [[Knight Errant: Escape 4|''Knight Errant: Escape'' 4]] released.
*12 – [[Lost Tribe of the Sith—Spiral 2|''Lost Tribe of the Sith—Spiral'' 2]] released.
*[[September 14|14]] – ''[[The Star Wars Trilogy]]'' reprinted as part of the [[Barnes & Noble Collectible Editions]] series.
*14 – [[Winston Rekert]] dies.
*[[September 16|16]] – [[Star Wars Identities: The Exhibition]] ends.
*[[September 19|19]] – [[Bernard Behrens]] dies.
*19 – [[Darth Vader and the Ghost Prison 5|''Darth Vader and the Ghost Prison'' 5]] released.
*[[September 20|20]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.38|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.38]] published.
*[[September 25|25]] – ''[[Star Wars Art: Illustration]]'' published
*25 – [[Star Wars: Crimson Empire III—Empire Lost (TPB)|''Star Wars: Crimson Empire III—Empire Lost'' trade paperback]] published
*[[September 26|26]] – [[Darth Maul—Death Sentence 3|''Darth Maul—Death Sentence'' 3]] released.
*26 - [[LEGO Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Out]] aired on Cartoon Network.
*[[September 29|29]] – The [[The Clone Wars: Season Five|fifth season]] of ''The Clone Wars'' began with the episode "[[Revival (episode)|Revival]]."

==October==
*[[October 1|01]] – [[The Secret Journal of Doctor Demagol (article)|''The Secret Journal of Doctor Demagol'']] republished on [[Unbound Worlds|Suvudu]].
*[[October 2|02]] – ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' released.
*[[October 6|06]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars|The Clone Wars]]: "[[A War on Two Fronts]]" aired.
*[[October 10|10]] – [[Lost Tribe of the Sith—Spiral 3|''Lost Tribe of the Sith—Spiral'' 3]] released.
*10 – [[Knight Errant: Escape 5|''Knight Errant: Escape'' 5]] released.
*[[October 12|12]] – The Clone Wars: "[[Front Runners]]" aired.
*[[October 15|15]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Encyclopedia]]'' released.
*15 – ''[[Star Wars Year by Year: A Visual Chronicle (updated edition)]]'' released.
*[[October 16|16]] – ''[[Star Wars: A Galactic Pop-Up Adventure]]'' released.
*[[October 17|17]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Clone Wars Volume 2: The Enemy on All Sides]]'' released.
*17 – [[Agent of the Empire – Hard Targets 1|''Agent of the Empire – Hard Targets'' 1]] released.
*17 – ''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Action Figure Collection]]'' released.
*[[October 18|18]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.39|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.39]] published.
*[[October 20|20]] – The Clone Wars: "[[The Soft War]]" aired.
*[[October 23|23]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars The Complete Season Four|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'': The Complete Season Four]] released.
*23 – [[Star Wars Insider 137|''Star Wars Insider'' 137]] published.
*[[October 24|24]] – ''[[Star Wars: Agent of the Empire Volume 1—Iron Eclipse]]'' released.
*24 – ''[[Star Wars: Dark Times Volume Five—Out of the Wilderness]]'' released.
*[[October 27|27]] – The Clone Wars: "[[Tipping Points]]" aired.
*[[October 29|29]] – ''[[Star Wars: Who Saved the Galaxy?]]'' released.
*[[October 30|30]] – [[The Walt Disney Company]] agrees to acquire [[Lucasfilm]] for $4.05 billion and announces [[Star Wars: Episode VII The Force Awakens|''Star Wars'': Episode VII]] to be released in [[2015]].
*[[October 31|31]] – [[Darth Maul—Death Sentence 4|''Darth Maul—Death Sentence'' 4]] released.

==November==
*[[November 3|03]] – The Clone Wars: "[[The Gathering (episode)|The Gathering]]" aired.
*[[November 7|07]] – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Volume 10: War]]'' released.
*[[November 10|10]] – The Clone Wars: "[[A Test of Strength]]" aired.
*[[November 12|12]] – [[The Knight Errant Gazetteer|''Essential Atlas'' Extra: The ''Knight Errant'' Gazetteer]] online supplement to ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[November 13|13]] – ''[[The Old Republic: Annihilation]]'' released.
*13 – ''[[Star Wars and History]]'' released.
*[[November 14|14]] – [[Lost Tribe of the Sith—Spiral 4|''Lost Tribe of the Sith—Spiral'' 4]] released.
*[[November 15|15]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.40|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.40]] published.
*15 – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' goes free to play.
*15 – ''[[Cartel Market]]'' the in-game store of '''Star Wars: The Old Republic''' released.
*[[November 17|17]] – The Clone Wars: "[[Bound for Rescue]]" aired.
*[[November 18|18]] – [[Wikipedia:Wii U|Wii U]] released.
*[[November 21|21]] – [[Agent of the Empire – Hard Targets 2|''Agent of the Empire – Hard Targets'' 2]] released.
*[[November 24|24]] – The Clone Wars: "[[A Necessary Bond]]" aired.
*[[November 27|27]] – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Ascension]]'' paperback released.
*[[November 28|28]] – [[Dawn of the Jedi: The Prisoner of Bogan 1|''Dawn of the Jedi: The Prisoner of Bogan'' 1]] released.

==December==
*[[December 1|01]] – The Clone Wars: "[[Secret Weapons]]" aired.
*[[December 5|05]] – [[Purge – The Tyrant's Fist 1|''Purge – The Tyrant's Fist'' 1]] released.
*[[December 8|08]] – The Clone Wars: "[[A Sunny Day in the Void]]" aired.
*[[December 10|10]] – ''[[Winner Lose All]]'' released.
*[[December 11|11]] – [[Star Wars Insider 138|''Star Wars Insider'' 138]] published.
*[[December 12|12]] – [[Lost Tribe of the Sith—Spiral 5|''Lost Tribe of the Sith—Spiral'' 5]] released.
*[[December 13|13]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.41|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.41]] published.
*[[December 17|17]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Ahsoka in Action!]]'' released.
*17 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Masters of the Force]]'' released.
*17 – ''[[Star Wars: Edge of the Empire Beginner Game]]'' full game released.
*[[December 18|18]] – ''[[Star Wars: Dawn of the Jedi Book One—Force Storm]]'' published
*[[December 19|19]] – [[Agent of the Empire – Hard Targets 3|''Agent of the Empire – Hard Targets'' 3]] released.
*19 – [[Dawn of the Jedi: The Prisoner of Bogan 2|''Dawn of the Jedi: The Prisoner of Bogan'' 2]] released.
*19 – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Clone Wars Volume 3: The Republic Falls]]'' released.
*[[December 20|20]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Card Game Core Set]]'' released.
*[[December 21|21]] – [[The Walt Disney Company|Disney]] finalizes its purchase of [[Lucasfilm]].
*[[December 24|24]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Who Are the Jedi?]]'' released.
*24 – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: What Is a Sith Warrior?]]'' released.
